business.name: Sunshine Electric
business.tagline: Brightening Tampa — One Connection at a Time

hero.headline: *Fast & Reliable* Electrical Service — Tampa's Trusted Experts
hero.subheadline: Licensed electricians ready 24/7 with upfront flat-rate pricing. No surprises, no delays — just professional electrical solutions for your home or business.

services_section.label: WHAT WE DO
services_section.heading: Complete Electrical Solutions
services_section.subheading: From quick repairs to major upgrades, we handle all your electrical needs with precision and care.

services.title: Emergency Electrical Repair
services.description: 24/7 response for power outages, sparking outlets, tripped breakers, and urgent electrical issues. Our certified electricians arrive fast with fully-stocked trucks.

services.title: Electrical Panel Upgrades
services.description: Modernize outdated panels to handle today's electrical demands. We install 200-amp panels, GFCI protection, and code-compliant upgrades for safety and efficiency.

services.title: Complete Wiring Services
services.description: New construction wiring, rewiring old homes, outlet installation, ceiling fans, and lighting circuits. All work meets Florida electrical codes with permits pulled.

services.title: Lighting Installation
services.description: Indoor and outdoor lighting design, LED upgrades, recessed lighting, landscape lighting, and smart home lighting systems. Transform your space with modern fixtures.

services.title: Electrical Safety Inspections
services.description: Comprehensive electrical system evaluations for home buyers, insurance requirements, or peace of mind. We identify hazards and provide detailed repair recommendations.

about.heading: Tampa's Most Trusted Electrical Contractors
about.body: Since 2015, Sunshine Electric has been Tampa Bay's go-to electrical contractor for reliable, honest service. Our master electricians bring decades of experience to every job — from quick repairs in Westchase to major renovations in Hyde Park. We're fully licensed, insured, and committed to keeping your family safe with code-compliant work that lasts.

reviews_section.label: REAL CUSTOMERS
reviews_section.heading: What Tampa Says About Our Work

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: Called Sunshine Electric when our panel kept tripping during a storm. Mike arrived within 2 hours on a Sunday night and had everything working safely by midnight. Fair pricing and excellent work — highly recommend!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: Needed our entire home rewired before closing. The team worked efficiently over 3 days, passed inspection on first try, and cleaned up perfectly. Worth every penny for the peace of mind.

reviews.name: Jennifer M.
reviews.text: Upgraded our 1960s panel to 200-amp service. They explained everything clearly, pulled permits properly, and the city inspector complimented their clean work. Professional from start to finish.

reviews.name: Robert T.
reviews.text: Fast response for a kitchen outlet that wasn't working. Turned out to be a GFCI issue they fixed in 15 minutes. Could have charged more but kept it honest. These guys have integrity.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE
service_areas.heading: Serving Tampa Bay & Surrounding Areas
service_areas.subheading: Fast, reliable electrical service throughout Hillsborough County and beyond.

cta.heading: Ready to Solve Your Electrical Problem?
cta.body: Don't wait for electrical issues to get worse. Our licensed electricians are standing by with upfront pricing and guaranteed workmanship. Call now for same-day service!
